title: Tech stocks today: Chip stocks pull back, Trump says he's meeting with AI executives
sentences: Tech stocks today: Chip stocks pull back, Trump says he's meeting with AI executives Tech stocks are recovering from a brusing sell-off ahead of Oracle earnings, Apple's Worldwide Developers Conference, and the highly anticipated SpaceX IPO.
